creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 205853
net-mgmt/alertmanager: Update to 0.18.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/alertmanager to 0.18.0.

It also:
  - Includes the improvements made in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=238917 by Dmitri
  - Adds an upgrade notice to pkg-message
  - Sets some additional GO_BUILDFLAGS to improve the information available in the Status page of the UI

The patch passes portlint and poudriere testport.

-David
